pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8: cp -r /workspace/data/gs-maven /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/gs-maven; This is the runtime path where the project is copied to in the Eclipse environment

HelloWorld.java declares 'package hello' and 'public class HelloWorld'; pom.xml line 41 declares '<mainClass>hello.HelloWorld</mainClass>'; Verified against official Spring Getting Started guide (https://github.com/spring-attic/gs-maven)

privileged_info_summary: The gs-maven project is a Maven-based Java application from the official Spring Getting Started guide. The main executable class is hello.HelloWorld (fully qualified name), located in the package 'hello' at src/main/java/hello/HelloWorld.java. The project directory at runtime will be /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/gs-maven after being copied from the bundled project data. The HelloWorld.java main method uses the Joda-Time library to display the current local time and a greeting from the Greeter class.
